name: Founding
summary: One prompt launches the project. PRNG ported, comparison framework built, 126 special levels converted. Codex joins day 4. The insight: match every random number.

name: Measurement
summary: Session recording goes deterministic. Oracle test framework, git notes, 1000th commit. The shift from coding to measuring.

name: Porting Grind
summary: 73 CODEMATCH functions in one day. Watchdog agent learns to nudge. Human pushes back on test-only rules. Model switched to Sonnet for throughput.

name: Codex Sprint
summary: Codex agents drive CODEMATCH: animation, HP/PW/regen, mkmaze, throw/beam paths. 782 human messages on Feb 24. The porting gets broad but shallow.

name: Iron Parity
summary: Automated C-to-JS translator campaign. Batch-promotes hundreds of functions. Async revolution: 28 unawaited calls. Then declared unsuccessful. Pivot to direct parity fixes.

name: Expansion
summary: Rogue ported in a day. Hack matures. Cockatrice, steed, input overhaul. 44 LORE lessons on March 11. Six games running simultaneously.

name: Ecosystem
summary: Shell easter egg born. Rogue 84↙99%. Dungeon speedruns. Human: "do not avoid the difficult divergences." Switch to Opus. The project becomes a universe.

name: Convergence
summary: Logo from scratch. Reflections essay. seed031 cascade: 25 LORE lessons. Terminal unification. The project becomes self-aware.
